SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

DANIEL RILEY & IVEY SING, Esq. appeared for plaintiff BAYVIEW PRESERVATION, L.P. day's hearing.
No appearance by defendant LASHEA MCCRAY.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff BAYVIEW PRESERVATION, L.P., and against the DEFENDANT LASHEA H. MCCRAY.

POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 19 GARLINGTON COURT, #245, SF, CA 94124.
FORFEITURE OF LEASE AGREEMENT.
HOLDOVER DAMAGES $83.16; COSTS $340.; TOTAL JUDGMT $423.16.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
